headline: The eval loop now actuates the codebase, not just observes it.
summary: glim-think collapsed onto one observable AI-SDK LLM path, the research swarm became eval-scorecard-aware, and a closed self-improvement loop landed: eval failures → clustered → minimal prompt/criteria patch → A/B-tested on a frozen golden dataset → auto-merged on green, with hard safety rails. This page is data-driven — edit src/data/lab-status.json to update it each cycle.

shipped.title: One observable LLM path; dead gateway deleted
shipped.detail: Two LLM stacks consolidated to a single AI-SDK-native path so every call is an observable ai.generateText span. The legacy gateway/ModelRouter (0/300 Phoenix spans — unobservable, unsteerable) was removed entirely.

shipped.title: Eval-aware research swarm + per-agent attribution
shipped.detail: Theorist/Causal/Orchestrator deep-tier synthesis now routes through the scorecard-balanced multi-provider tier (MiniMax/GLM, OpenAI as last decider); per-agent functionId so the model×agent scorecard separates agents instead of collapsing them.

shipped.title: Phoenix Experiments + dataset-read client
shipped.detail: The golden datasets (glim-benchmark 382, glim-research-qa 444, glim-experiment-design 37) are now readable and usable for controlled experiments, not just write-only.

shipped.title: A/B oracle
shipped.detail: Baseline-vs-candidate over a golden-dataset slice, scored by the existing combo + LLM-judge evaluators, emitting an adopt/reject verdict with regression detection.

shipped.title: The Evolver (self-improvement spine)
shipped.detail: Diagnoses failure clusters, synthesizes one minimal registry patch, A/B-tests it, and auto-merges on green — confined to src/registry/ by a path allowlist, with an EVOLVER_ENABLED kill switch (default OFF), a circuit breaker, and regression-gate auto-revert.

shipped.title: Case-study documentation
shipped.detail: PHOENIX_EVALS_CASE_STUDY.md rewritten to document the closed loop honestly — proven vs armed-but-gated — with fabricated before/after metrics removed.

inProgress.title: Prompt/criteria registry substrate
inProgress.detail: Versioned per-agent prompt registry the Evolver writes into; agent worker did not land a PR this cycle.

inProgress.title: Scorecard provenance
inProgress.detail: Controlled experiment scores outranking biased production samples; pending.

inProgress.title: Regression gate auto-revert
inProgress.detail: CI gate that auto-reverts a regressing evolver:auto commit; pending.

knownIssues.title: Parallel worktree isolation failed — local atlas-view WIP edits lost
knownIssues.detail: A parallel agent fan-out operated on the shared repo instead of isolated worktrees; a git reset reverted ~11 tracked atlas-view files (≈230 lines of integration wiring). Untracked new modules (PotentialBrowser, NIST catalog system) survived. Root-cause noted; the fan-out approach is suspended pending an isolation fix. Reported transparently rather than buried.

knownIssues.title: Evolver ships gated
knownIssues.detail: EVOLVER_ENABLED defaults OFF. Auto-merge-on-green is wired but will not run until the path-allowlist, circuit-breaker, and auto-revert rails are exercised end-to-end.
